markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
markets.rules_primary: If Alex Michelsen wins the Jung vs Michelsen professional tennis match in the 2026 ATP Challenger Newport Round Of 16 after a ball has been played, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Jung vs Michelsen professional tennis match in the 2026 ATP Challenger Newport Round Of 16 after a ball has been played. If the match does not occur (signaled by a ball being played) due to a player injury, walkover, forfeiture, or any other cancellation (all before the match starts), the market will resolve to a fair price in accordance with the rules. If this match is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled match has finished (within two weeks).
markets.title: Will Alex Michelsen win the Jung vs Michelsen: Round Of 16 match?

markets.rules_primary: If Kohlmann de Freitas / Maria Zarate wins the Kohlmann de Freitas / Maria Zarate vs Grippo / Lima professional tennis match in the 2026 M15 San Salvador de Jujuy Quarterfinal after a ball has been played, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Kohlmann de Freitas / Maria Zarate vs Grippo / Lima professional tennis match in the 2026 M15 San Salvador de Jujuy Quarterfinal after a ball has been played. If the match does not occur (signaled by a ball being played) due to a player injury, walkover, forfeiture, or any other cancellation (all before the match starts), all markets will resolve to $0.50. If any player on either team does not participate in the match, even if a replacement plays and the match still takes place with some of the original players/teams, the event is considered a different match and all markets will be settled at $0.50. If a player/team withdraws or forfeits after a match has started, that team will resolve to No. If this match is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled match has finished (within two weeks).
markets.title: Will Kohlmann de Freitas / Maria Zarate win the Kohlmann de Freitas / Maria Zarate vs Grippo / Lima: M15 San Salvador de Jujuy Quarterfinal match?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Manny Machado records 2+ home runs in Arizona vs San Diego professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jul 9, 2026 at 9:40 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Manny Machado is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Manny Machado starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Manny Machado is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Manny Machado is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on home runs recorded.
markets.title: Manny Machado: 2+ home runs?
